data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplified user journeys to reduce decision paralysis and improve user experience.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation, clear call-to-action, minimalistic design

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimized button sizes and spacing to improve user interaction efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design, accessible button sizes, intuitive layout

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Ensures familiar design patterns to match user expectations.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Focus on memorable moments to enhance user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Critical interactions, exit strategies, emotional engagement

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Group related elements together to create more organized and intuitive design.
data.technical_spec: Visual hierarchy, group spacing, logical sectioning
